introSection: Vauhtimato is a steel kiddy roller coaster located at Särkänniemi in Finland.

sections.title: History
sections.content: When at Anna's Hoeve, this ride replaced another roller coaster which had been operating since the 1960s.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: This is the smallest variant of the Zierer Tivoli roller coaster, with an oval layout. It has the rarer lightweight, angled support structure.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Green track and dark green supports. The ride used to feature yellow track with dark green supports.

fullText:
Vauhtimato is a steel kiddy roller coaster located at Särkänniemi in Finland.

When at Anna's Hoeve, this ride replaced another roller coaster which had been operating since the 1960s.

This is the smallest variant of the Zierer Tivoli roller coaster, with an oval layout. It has the rarer lightweight, angled support structure.

Green track and dark green supports. The ride used to feature yellow track with dark green supports.






 * Photograph of the roller coaster
